details.test: Task 1: Start GRE Quant medium practice set with 45-minute timer
Task 2: Enroll in cheapest qualifying SAT monthly plan and go to checkout
Task 3: Create TOEFL study plan with date range, frequency, and focus areas
Task 4: Enroll in SAT Math course under $60, rating ≥ 4.5, ≥ 20 lessons
Task 5: Review ACT English diagnostic results and bookmark hard questions
Task 6: From GRE Verbal lowest score, add incorrect questions to Review Later
Task 7: Add IELTS vocab deck and start 20-card spaced repetition session
Task 8: Choose GMAT package with more questions (self-paced vs tutor-led) and add to cart
Task 9: Start custom SAT mixed practice with specific section counts and immediate feedback
